funFacts: They are the only insects that produce food consumed by humans, acting as critical agricultural pollinators.
Designed for Hard difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using high-resolution colored pencils.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about geometric symmetry and relaxing design while developing fine motor coordination.
